Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
  2. MapRecord

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream.MapRecord

Packages that use MapRecord
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
Data structures and interfaces to interact with Redis Streams.
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.stream

    Method
    Description
    default RecordId
    DefaultedRedisConnection.xAdd(MapRecord<byte[],byte[],byte[]> record, RedisStreamCommands.XAddOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    in favor of RedisCommandsProvider.streamCommands()}.

    default RecordId
    RedisStreamCommands.xAdd(@NonNull MapRecord<byte[],byte[],byte[]> record)
    Append the given record to the stream stored at Record#getStream.
    RecordId

    Append the given record to the stream stored at Record#getStream.

    Subinterfaces of MapRecord in org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ByteBufferRecord
    A Record within the stream backed by a collection of binary field/value pairs.
    interface 
    ByteRecord
    A Record within the stream backed by a collection of binary field/value pairs.
    interface 
    StringRecord
    A Record within the stream backed by a collection of String field/value pairs.

    Method
    Description

    MapRecord.create(S stream, Map<K,V> map)
    Creates a new MapRecord associated with the stream key and value.

    Deserialize key with the streamSerializer, field names with the fieldSerializer and values with the valueSerializer.

    Deserialize key and field/value pairs with the given RedisSerializer.

    Deserialize key with the streamSerializer, field names with the fieldSerializer and values with the valueSerializer.

    Deserialize key and field/value pairs with the given RedisSerializer.
    default <SK,HK,HV> MapRecord<SK,HK,HV>
    MapRecord.map(Function<MapRecord<S,K,V>, MapRecord<SK,HK,HV>> mapFunction)
    Map this MapRecord by applying the mapping Function.
    static <S,K,V> MapRecord<S,K,V>
    StreamRecords.mapBacked(Map<K,V> map)
    Create a new MapRecord backed by the field/value pairs of the given Map.
    default <HK,HV> MapRecord<S,HK,HV>
    MapRecord.mapEntries(Function<Map.Entry<K,V>, Map.Entry<HK,HV>> mapFunction)
    Apply the given mapFunction to each and every entry in the backing collection to create a new MapRecord.
    static <S,K,V> MapRecord<S,K,V>
    Record.of(Map<K,V> map)
    Create a new MapRecord instance backed by the given Map holding field/value pairs.
    <K,V> MapRecord<S,K,V>
    StreamRecords.RecordBuilder.ofMap(Map<K,V> map)
    Create a MapRecord.
    default <HK,HV> MapRecord<S,HK,HV>

    Apply the given HashMapper to the backing value to create a new MapRecord.
